name: VenturePilot-AI
description: AI Startup Blueprint Generator using IBM watsonx.ai, RAG, and IBM Cloud Object Storage.

SECRET_KEY.description: A secret key for Flask session security.

IBM_COS_API_KEY.description: Your IBM Cloud Object Storage API Key.

IBM_COS_INSTANCE_CRN.description: Your IBM Cloud Object Storage Instance CRN.

IBM_COS_ENDPOINT.description: IBM Cloud Object Storage Endpoint URL.

IBM_COS_BUCKET_KB.description: IBM COS Bucket for RAG knowledge base.

IBM_COS_BUCKET_REPORTS.description: IBM COS Bucket for storing generated reports.

IBM_COS_BUCKET_RESOURCES.description: IBM COS Bucket for resources database.
